control_mode.validation_profile_comment: strict keeps full guardrails enabled. explore allows more experimentation when explicit control flags are enabled.
control_mode.allow_threshold_decoupling_comment: When true, BL-005 retrieval numeric_thresholds and BL-006 scoring numeric_thresholds may differ. Default false for strict semantic consistency.
control_mode.allow_weight_auto_normalization_comment: When true, scoring component weights are allowed to sum != 1.0 and BL-006 normalizes active weights at runtime.

seed_controls.match_rate_min_threshold_comment: Minimum acceptable match rate (0.0-1.0) for imported tracks against DS-001 corpus. Set to 0.3 (30%) based on empirical data showing 32.2% match rate with current corpus. Known limitation: DS-001 has limited coverage of user's import history - preference profiles built from incomplete data. See Chapter 3 for bias documentation.

retrieval_controls.profile_top_tag_limit_comment: Must be <= profile_controls.top_tag_limit. Retrieval cannot request more profile tags than BL-004 produces.

scoring_controls.component_weights_sum_rule_comment: Component weights must sum to 1.0 within +/-0.01 tolerance. BL-006 logs a warning if active weights are rebalanced to normalize to 1.0.

observability_controls.bootstrap_mode_comment: Config-driven observability mode flag recorded in BL-009 metadata.
